english translation text: Dua Ahad

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah the Lord of the Great Light,
the Lord of the Elevated Throne,
the Lord of the swollen ocean,
the Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Psalms,
the Lord of shade and heat,
the Revealer of the Great Qur'an,
and the Lord of the Archangels,
the Prophets, and the Messengers:
O Allah, I beseech You in Your Noble Name,
in the Light of Your Luminous Face
and Your Eternal Kingdom.
O Ever-living! O Self-Subsistent!

arabic text: اسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي اشْرَقَتْ بِهِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ وَٱلارَضُونَ
english translation text: I beseech You in the name of Your Name with which the heavens and the earth have lit up

arabic text: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي يَصْلَحُ بِهِ ٱلاوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
english translation text: and in Your Name with which the past and the coming generations have become upright!
O He Who has been always alive before the existence of all living things!
O He Who shall be alive after the extinction of all living things!
O He Who has been always alive even when there was nothing else alive!
O He Who revives the dead ones and causes the living ones to die!

arabic text: يَا حَيُّ لا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
english translation text: O Ever-living! There is no god save You.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْ مَوْلاَنَا ٱلإِمَامَ ٱلْهَادِيَ ٱلْمَهْدِيَّ ٱلْقَائِمَ بِامْرِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, convey to our master Imam al-Mahdi, the guide who is to undertake Your orders,

arabic text: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آبَائِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
english translation text: may Allah’s blessings be upon him and upon his immaculate fathers,
on behalf of all of the believing men and women
in the east and west of the earth
and in plains, mountains,
lands, and seas,
and on behalf of my parents
(convey to him) blessings that are as weighty as Allah’s Throne,
as much as the ink of His Words,

arabic text: وَمَا احْصَاهُ عِلْمُهُ وَاحَاطَ بِهِ كِتَابُهُ
english translation text: and as many as that which is counted by His knowledge and encompassed by His Book.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اجَدِّدُ لَهُ فِي صَبِيحَةِ يَوْمِي هٰذَا
english translation text: O Allah, I update to him in the beginning of this day
and throughout the days of lifetime a pledge,

arabic text: عَهْداً وَعَقْداً وَبَيْعَةً لَهُ فِي عُنُقِي
english translation text: a covenant, and allegiance to which I commit myself

arabic text: لا احُولُ عَنْه وَلا ازُولُ ابَداً
english translation text: and from which I neither convert nor change.
O Allah, (please do) make me of his supporters,
sponsors, defenders,
and those who hurry in carrying out his instructions,
those who comply with his orders,
those who uphold him,
those who precede others to implementing his will,
and those who will be martyred before him.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ حَالَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُ ٱلْمَوْتُ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلْتَهُ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِكَ حَتْماً مَقْضِيّاً
english translation text: O Allah, if death that You have made inevitably and certainly incumbent upon Your servants stands between me and him,
then (please do) take me out of my grave using my shroud as dress,
unsheathing my sword,
holding my lance in my hand,

arabic text: مُلَبِّياً دَعْوَةَ ٱلدَّاعِي فِي ٱلْحَاضِرِ وَٱلْبَادِي
english translation text:
and responding to the call
of the Caller who shall announce (his advent) in urban areas and deserts.
O Allah, (please do) show me his magnificent mien
and his praiseworthy forehead,
delight my eyes by letting me have a look at him.
And (please) expedite his relief,
make his reappearance easy,
clear a spacious space for him,
guide me to follow his course,
give success to his issues,
and confirm his strength.
O Allah, construct Your lands through him
and refresh Your servants through him,
For You have said, and true are Your words:
“Corruption has appeared in the land and the sea
on account of what the hands of men have wrought.”
So, O Allah, (please) show us Your vicegerent,
the son of Your Prophet,
and the namesake of Your Messenger,
peace be upon him and his Household,

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ لا يَظْفَرَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ ٱلْبَاطِلِ إِلاَّ مَزَّقَهُ
english translation text: so that he shall tear up any wrong item that he will face
and shall confirm and approve of the truth.
O Allah, (please) make him the shelter to whom Your wronged servants shall resort,

arabic text: وَنَاصِراً لِمَنْ لا يَجِدُ لَهُ نَاصِراً غَيْرَكَ
english translation text: the supporter of those who cannot find any supporter save You,

arabic text: وَمُجَدِّداً لِمَا عُطِّلَ مِنْ احْكَامِ كِتَابِكَ
english translation text: the reviver of the laws of Your Book that have been suspended,

arabic text: وَمُشَيِّداً لِمَا وَرَدَ مِنْ اعْلامِ دِينِكَ وَسُنَنِ نَبِيِّكَ
english translation text: and the constructor of all signs of Your religion and instructions of Your Messenger,
peace be upon him and his Household, that he will see.

arabic text: وَٱجْعَلْهُ ٱللَّهُمَّ مِمَّنْ حَصَّنْتَهُ مِنْ بَاسِ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
english translation text: O Allah, (please) include him with those whom You protect from the domination of the aggressors.
O Allah, (please) delight Your Prophet Muhammad,
peace be upon him and his Household,
as well as all those who followed him in his promulgation by making (us) see him,
and (please) have mercy upon our humiliation after him.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱكْشِفْ هٰذِهِ ٱلْغُمَّةَ عَنْ هٰذِهِ ٱلامَّةِ بِحُضُورِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, (please) relieve this community from the (current) grief through presenting him
and expedite his advent for us:
“Surely, they think it to be far off, and We see it nigh.”
[do all that] In the name of Your mercy; O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
You may then slap your right thigh with your hand three times and, at each time, say the following words:

arabic text: الْعَجَلَ ٱلْعَجَلَ يَامَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
english translation text: (We pray for Your) earliest advent, earliest advent, O Patron of the Age.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
